description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang syntax checks that runs on every push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. Use multiple ubuntu-22.04 jobs to check C++ syntax with Clang for various C++ standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20) with and without STL, and with forced C++03 implementation.
